summary: Current deterministic proof for CLI guide claims covering review variant result envelopes, explicit evidence bundle aggregation, and reviewer-first self-dogfood HTML projections.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: CLI guide decision packets and reviewable projections
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the three listed docs/guides/cli.md claims are marked satisfied.
notClaimed: A real external judge or model provider was called.
Every possible blocked or failed reason code is enumerated.
A reviewer verdict is semantically correct just because the execution envelope is valid.
Raw host logs, scenario history, or audit records are automatically discovered without explicit inputs.
Rendered HTML replaces JSON packets as the source of truth.
All browser or responsive visual qualities are exhaustively validated.

protectedBehaviors: review variants can finish as blocked and failed with structured variant result packets
blocked unavailable executor cases carry unavailable_executor reason codes
partialSuccess and successfulVariantOutputs are preserved when one variant succeeds and another does not
self-dogfood renderer CLI entrypoints write decision-first HTML indexes
evidence prepare-input assembles explicit report, scenario_results, run_audit, and scenario_history sources
evidence bundle summarizes prioritized evidence signals
active-run defaults write evidence input and bundle packets inside the active run
checked-in evidence input and bundle examples match schemas
self-dogfood HTML includes headline decision fields
self-dogfood HTML index is written next to the latest bundle
artifact links are rewritten for reviewer navigation

commandEvidence.command: ./bin/cautilus doctor commands --json | jq -c '[.commands[] | select(.path==["evaluate","evidence","prepare-input"] or .path==["evaluate","evidence","bundle"] or .path==["evaluate","review","variants"] or .path==["doctor","artifacts","render-self-dogfood-html"] or .path==["doctor","artifacts","render-self-dogfood-experiments-html"]) | .path | join(" ")]'

decision.reason: Focused tests and current command registry output prove the current docs/guides/cli.md review-variant, evidence-bundle, and self-dogfood-renderer claims without claiming external provider success or semantic reviewer correctness.
